defaults.taskTitle: Hire your first engineer and create a hiring plan
defaults.taskDescription:
You are the CEO. You set the direction for the company.

- hire a founding engineer
- write a hiring plan
- break the roadmap into concrete tasks and start delegating work

step1.title: Name your company
step1.subtitle: This is the organization your agents will work for.
step1.missionPlaceholder: What is this company trying to achieve?

step2.title: Create your first agent
step2.subtitle: Choose how this agent will run tasks.

adapter.envSubtitle: Runs a live probe that asks the adapter CLI to respond with hello.
adapter.anthropicUnsetHint: Claude failed while ANTHROPIC_API_KEY is set. You can clear it in this CEO adapter config and retry the probe.
adapter.authIfFailsEnv: If auth fails, set {{envKey}} in env or run {{loginCmd}}.
adapter.ifLoginRequired: If login is required, run {{command}} and retry.

step3.title: Give it something to do
step3.subtitle: Give your agent a small task to start with — a bug fix, a research question, writing a script.
step3.descriptionPlaceholder: Add more detail about what the agent should do...

step4.title: Ready to launch
step4.subtitle: Everything is set up. Launching now will create the starter task, wake the agent, and open the issue.

errors.needCompanyForTest: Create or select a company before testing adapter environment.
errors.openCodeModelFormat: OpenCode requires an explicit model in provider/model format.
errors.openCodeModelsLoading: OpenCode models are still loading. Please wait and try again.
errors.openCodeNoModels: No OpenCode models discovered. Run `opencode models` and authenticate providers.
errors.anthropicRetryStillFailing: Retried with ANTHROPIC_API_KEY unset in adapter config, but the environment test is still failing.
errors.anthropicUnsetFailed: Failed to unset ANTHROPIC_API_KEY and retry.
